highlights.text: Generally, the bull case for tomorrow would be that this zone holds.
As readers recall, the active setup heading into today was my core setup: A picture perfect bullish failed breakdown which triggered yesterday when we lost Thursdays 5734 lows, and recovered.
I wrote yesterday: “There is an active failed breakdown present where we lost the Thursday lows at 5733, flushed it, and recovered.
You are going to need to know how to trade Failed Breakdowns

post_title: Election Results Incoming. Expect Volatility For SPX. Plan for November 6th.
